# h2t-graphs API

> Knowledge graph engine for multi-source graphs consumed by LLM agents.

Base URL: https://graphs.lichtpfadstudio.com
Auth: X-H2T-Token header required for /api/ endpoints.
Docs: https://graphs.lichtpfadstudio.com/docs

## API Endpoints

All endpoints are under /api/ prefix.

### Read

- GET /api/sources — list available graph sources
- GET /api/query?source={alias}&search={keywords} — keyword search
- GET /api/query?source={alias}&semantic={text} — vector semantic search (Gemini embeddings)
- GET /api/query?source={alias}&semantic={text}&expand=true — with LLM query expansion
- GET /api/query?source={alias}&search={kw}&semantic={text} — hybrid (keyword + semantic)
- GET /api/query?source={alias}&type={node_type} — filter by node type
- GET /api/related?source={alias}&to={node_id}&depth={n} — BFS graph traversal
- GET /api/get?source={alias}&id={node_id} — get single node by ID
- GET /api/stats?source={alias} — node/edge counts

### Write

- POST /api/nodes — add node (auto-embeds on write)
- PATCH /api/nodes/{node_id}/confidence — update confidence (+/- delta)
- POST /api/edges — add edges
- POST /api/feedback — append feedback event

## Sources

| Alias | Nodes | Domain | Description |
|-------|-------|--------|-------------|
| creative | 901 | methodology | Chernyshov Creative Thinking: frameworks, concepts, principles, cases |
| triz | 168 | methodology | TRIZ Altshuller: principles, contradictions, examples |
| design-thinking | 65 | methodology | d.school Design Thinking: phases, methods, tools |
| td | 678 | dcc | TouchDesigner operators |
| courses-en | 6,571 | education | Hou2Touch courses (EN): lessons, chapters, concepts |
| courses-ru | 2,808 | education | Hou2Touch courses (RU): lessons, chapters, concepts |

## Response Format

All query endpoints return:
```json
{
  "query_meta": {
    "source": "creative",
    "nodes_returned": 5,
    "tokens_estimate": 250
  },
  "results": [
    {
      "id": "framework_инверсия",
      "node_type": "framework",
      "label": "Инверсия",
      "confidence": 0.95,
      "_score": 0.87,
      "description": "...",
      "when_to_use": "..."
    }
  ]
}
```

## Search Modes

1. **Keyword** (`search=`) — case-insensitive text match, weighted scoring
2. **Semantic** (`semantic=`) — Gemini embedding cosine similarity, 768d vectors
3. **Hybrid** (`search=` + `semantic=`) — merged keyword + semantic with score normalization
4. **Expanded** (`semantic=` + `expand=true`) — LLM expands query with synonyms before embedding

## Usage from Python

```python
import httpx

API = "https://graphs.lichtpfadstudio.com"
TOKEN = "your-token"

r = httpx.get(f"{API}/api/query",
    params={"source": "td", "semantic": "noise generation"},
    headers={"X-H2T-Token": TOKEN})
for node in r.json()["results"][:5]:
    print(f"{node['_score']:.2f} {node['label']}")
```
